title: Gaffer On Games
creator: Glenn Fiedler
description: An archive of technical articles on fixed timesteps, integration, constraints, deterministic simulation, state synchronization, packet design, and networked physics.
useful: The explanations identify practical failure modes that are often missing from shorter physics and multiplayer tutorials.
audience: Intermediate and advanced programmers building real-time physics or multiplayer systems.
learning: Choose stable approaches to simulation time
Compare networking models and their tradeoffs
Recognize common numerical and packet-level failures
